Özgeçmiş

Professor Dr. Özgür ÜNAL ERİŞ received her bachelor degree from Boğaziçi University Political Science and International Department in 1996. She then completed her masters in 1998 in University of Exeter Centre of European Studies. Eriş received her PhD from University of Essex Department of Government in 2005. She taught at Bahçeşehir University between 2001-2015 and Gedik University between 2014-2015. Eriş specializes on soft security threats; specifically illegal migration and Turkey’s role as a transit route between Europe and the Middle East, conflict resolution strategies and EU as the conflict manager, European Neighbourhood Policy and external relations of the EU, politics of oil and energy security, Turkey-EU relations, specifically the impact of EU on democratisation of Turkey. She speaks fluent English and German.
